channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 6.0 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Off Hawaii Coast
item.description: A 6.0 magnitude earthquake occurred south of Honaunau-Napoopoo, Hawaii, with no tsunami threat reported.

item.title: Remains of divers killed in Maldives cave accident sent back to Italy
item.description: Four Italian divers who died in an underwater cave have been repatriated. Another body had been returned earlier.

item.title: Coal mine blast in China kills 90, state media reports
item.description: This is China's deadliest mining accident in several years.

item.title: Over 40,000 evacuated in California as chemical leak threatens explosion
item.description: Officials in Southern California expanded evacuations in Orange County due to a leaking toxic chemical tank that may explode.
